title: The Brief – Russia growls at European drone makers
summary_full: Russia's former president said that the ministry's statement should be taken "literally" and that these manufacturers are “potential targets for the Russian armed forces”
summary_public: Russia's former president said that the ministry's statement should be taken "literally" and that these manufacturers are “potential targets for the Russian armed forces”

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia growls at European drone makers
